name: nextdns-skills
description: Comprehensive AI agent skills for NextDNS management, covering API integration, CLI operations, and Web UI configuration best practices.
author: Tuan Duc Tran <tuanductran.dev@gmail.com>

scripts.lint: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run types:check && pnpm run "/^lint:(md|rules|syntax)$/"
scripts.lint:all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:links
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:md:fix && pnpm run lint:syntax:fix && pnpm run lint:rules && pnpm run types:check
scripts.lint:rules: pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts build && pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts validate-rules
scripts.update-counts: pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts build && pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts update-counts
scripts.check-duplicates: pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts build && pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts check-duplicates
scripts.check-tags: pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts build && pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts check-tags
scripts.stats: pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts build && pnpm -F nextdns-skills-scripts generate-stats --text
scripts.lint:quality: pnpm run check-duplicates && pnpm run check-tags
